prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: 26C-LBLH-ACACIAWOODENSPOONSET-4PC-BUN Product Type: SPOON Brand (from catalog): LABREA LIFE + HOME Existing Title: Labrea Life + Home 4pc Solid Acacia Wood Cooking Spoons Kitchen Utensils Set Description: In opposition to harsh metal or manufactured silicone kitchen utensils, opt for a more a natural option in your kitchen with Labrea Life + Homes’ Solid Acacia Wooden Cooking Spoons Kitchen Utensils Set.

This solid acacia wood cooking spoons are firstly, and importantly, food safe for all meal prep, cooking, baking, tasting and serving; furthermore, the wood cooking spoons won’t scratch or mark your pots and pans like other kitchen utensils can, especially where ceramic and non stick cookware or bakeware are concerned.

Meeting at the corner of function and form, these classic wooden spoons feature comfortable, rounded handles for ease of use when stirring or mixing, soft, smooth edges, balanced weight and natural wood grain finish. Whether for cooking pasta, mixing up homemade chocolate chip cookie batter or serving a fresh salad, you’ll reach for this wood cooking spoon and skimmer home essentials set time and time again, for their versatility and practicality across the kitchen.

Featuring a classic and simple design, we love these wooden cooking spoons not only for their timelessness and quality material construction, but for the welcomed dose of soft and organic visual texture. Functional, stylish and reliable, this kitchen utensils set will be a great addition to top drawer cooking tools and kitchen gadgets, or countertop utensil crock.

PLEASE NOTE: Wooden spoons and skimmer may vary in color and grain striations, due to the natural acacia wood material construction

CARE INSTRUCTIONS: To maintain finish and avoid cracking, hand washing is recommended, do not run through dishwasher; remove excess water after hand washing and leave to air dry. Search Terms: kitchen utensils set; cooking spoons; home and kitchen; kitchen gifts; kitchen tools; house warming gifts new home; new home essentials; kitchen essentials; household essentials; skimmer spoon; pasta spoon; spaghetti spoon; food meal prep Features: - NATURAL WOOD GRAIN: Please note that items may vary in color and grain due to the natural acacia wood material construction of this kitchen utensils set - FOOD SAFE KITCHEN UTENSILS: Natural acacia wooden cooking spoons are safe for all food and meal prep, cooking and baking; the kitchen utensils set is safe to use with ceramic or non stick pots, pans and other cookware - SOLID ACACIA WOOD KITCHEN UTENSILS: Cooking spoons feature a comfortable rounded handle, soft edges, natural Acacia wood grain and food safe finish; in addition to the cooking spoons practicality and versatility in the kitchen, they also add a welcomed dose of organic visual texture - KITCHEN ESSENTIALS: Solid acacia wood cooking spoons and skimmer spoon are a must have home essentials item you’ll reach for time and time again for meal prep, cooking, baking and serving; this kitchen utensil set features a timeless design, complemented by a soft and natural but durable finish - CARE INSTRUCTIONS: Hand wash only, do not run through dishwasher === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Labrea Life + Home 4-pc Acacia Wood Cooking Spoons Set

openai.item_name: Labrea Life + Home 4-Pk Acacia Wood Cooking Spoons Set

anthropic.title_differentiation: Food Safe Natural Wood, Non-Scratch Cookware, Hand Wash, Comfortable Rounded Handles, Kitchen Essentials

openai.title_differentiation: Solid Acacia Wood, Food Safe For Non Stick Cookware, Hand Wash Only, Natural Grain Finish, Rounded Handles
